payload.tactic: pose V := H k (DH.G.g ^ u, DH.G.g ^ w ^ u, (DH.G.g ^ z1 * DH.G.g ^ w ^ z2) ^ u * m{hr}); have hc: (DH.G.g ^ x1 * DH.G.g ^ w ^ x2) ^ u * (DH.G.g ^ y1 * DH.G.g ^ w ^ y2) ^ (u * V) = DH.G.g ^ u ^ (x1 + V * y1) * DH.G.g ^ w ^ u ^ (x2 + V * y2); first by rewrite log_bij !(logg1, logrzM, logDr); ring.

manager_note: Committed tactic accepted; the EasyCrypt proof state changed.
